titles.text: Arle no Bouken - Mahou no Jewel
アルルの冒険 まほうのジュエル

roms.name: Arle no Bouken - Mahou no Jewel (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

descriptions.text:
「アルルの冒険 まほうのジュエル」は、ぷよぷよのゲーム世界を舞台にしたモンスター収集RPGです。若き見習い魔法使いアルルが、魔法のジュエルを集め、再び世界征服を企む邪悪なサタンを倒すために土地を探索します。

ゲームは上からの視点で進行し、アルルを操作して町やダンジョンを探索し、NPCと会話したり、アイテムを見つけたり購入したりします。戦闘ではキャラクターが横からの視点に切り替わり、標準的なターン制の形式で行動を選択し、多くのモンスターや敵キャラクターと戦います。モンスターを倒すたびに、そのユニークなカードを手に入れることができ、そのカードを使ってモンスターを呼び出し、冒険に参加させることができます。常に2体までのモンスターがあなたの側で戦うことができ、彼らもあなたと同様にレベルアップし、経験値を得ます。

Arle no Bouken: Mahou no Jewel is a role playing game developed and published by Compile for the Game Boy Color; it was released on March 31, 2000. The game revolves around the collection of cards, each of which contains a monster. Madou Monogatari/Puyo Puyo protagonist Arle Nadja and her usual foes, such as Skeleton T and Schezo Wegey, use these monsters to assist them in battle.

The story begins with Arle and Carbuncle arriving in the Hero's Village in hopes of visiting the ongoing festival. Shortly after their arrival, a magical barrier manifests around the village, and they are told by Saturni that this barrier surrounds the village every year for the duration of the festival. In order to better understand the village and the festival, Arle seeks out Satan and the village elder Lunae, who both give her background regarding the Hero's Village and the Hero's Legend.

Lunae informs her that long ago, the Hero erected the barrier and sealed an evil away with the power of the stars. Shortly after this exchange, Arle witnesses a Puyo being transformed into a card, and is told that if the Puyo aren't turned back by the next day they will remain cards forever. She resolves to take the Puyo cards and turn them back to their real selves.
